timeSeriesQuery.timeSeriesQueryLanguage:
fetch gce_instance
| filter(resource.project_id = '${project_id}')
| { t_read:
      metric 'compute.googleapis.com/instance/disk/read_ops_count'
      | filter(metric.instance_name =~ 'sql-[0-9]+')
      | filter(metric.device_name =~ 'data-[0-9]+')
      | align rate(1m)
      | group_by [], [total: sum(value.read_ops_count)]
      | map add[direction: 'Read']
  ; t_write:
      metric 'compute.googleapis.com/instance/disk/write_ops_count'
      | filter(metric.instance_name =~ 'sql-[0-9]+')
      | filter(metric.device_name =~ 'data-[0-9]+')
      | align rate(1m)
      | group_by [], [total: sum(value.write_ops_count)]
      | map add[direction: 'Write'] }
| union

fetch gce_instance
| filter(resource.project_id = '${project_id}')
| { t_read:
      metric 'compute.googleapis.com/instance/disk/read_bytes_count'
      | filter(metric.instance_name =~ 'sql-[0-9]+')
      | filter(metric.device_name =~ 'data-[0-9]+')
      | align rate(1m)
      | group_by [], [total: sum(value.read_bytes_count)]
      | map add[direction: 'Read']
  ; t_write:
      metric 'compute.googleapis.com/instance/disk/write_bytes_count'
      | filter(metric.instance_name =~ 'sql-[0-9]+')
      | filter(metric.device_name =~ 'data-[0-9]+')
      | align rate(1m)
      | group_by [], [total: sum(value.write_bytes_count)]
      | map add[direction: 'Write'] }
| union
